settings.quote: More than an event — it's a movement.
settings.body: The DREAM Expo is a springboard for the people of Hawaiʻi, a community initiative designed to awaken dreams, elevate purpose, and empower individuals across Hawaiʻi to live with passion and impact. This annual gathering brings together leaders, learners, and visionaries from every sphere of influence.
settings.col1_body: The Dream Expo provides insights, tools and access to resources positioning participants to believe, then live "Dreams Realized."
settings.col2_body: The Dream Expo is a springboard for the people of Hawaiʻi to Dream Again — with courage, clarity, and community.

settings.heading: Location
settings.text:
South Pacific Ballroom
Hilton Hawaiian Village
Honolulu, Hawaiʻi

settings.heading: Audience
settings.text: Open to public — nonprofits, students, business leaders, creatives & media professionals

settings.heading: Goal
settings.text: Ignite dreams, foster connections & provide resources for transformative growth

settings.heading: Connect. Dream. Build Together.
settings.body: Utilizing the DREAM Academy blueprint — our signature structure — to build with integrity, grow revenue through sustainable practices and creative innovation.

settings.title: Keynote & Panel Sessions
settings.description: Industry leaders share actionable blueprints for vision-to-reality journeys.

settings.title: Live Exhibitions
settings.description: Discover local & global brands, creative showcases, and curated experiences.

settings.title: Networking & Mentorship
settings.description: Connect with changemakers from every sphere of influence across Hawaiʻi.

settings.heading: Red Thread Collective
settings.subtitle: Founded in Hawaiʻi • Stitched with Aloha
settings.body_1: Born from the unlikely yet inspired friendship between a pizza guy and a couture designer, Red Thread Collective is more than a fashion label — it's a movement of creativity, craftsmanship, and connection.
settings.body_2: We are proud to honor Red Thread Collective as our Exhibitor of the Year — a brand that beautifully embodies the spirit of dreams realized and collaboration in action.

settings.body: The Dream Expo is the culmination of the Dream Academy journey — where graduates showcase their mastery, connect with industry agents, and step onto the global stage. Every exhibitor, speaker, and attendee is part of a larger ecosystem of excellence.

settings.heading: Be Part of the Movement
settings.subtext: Where dreamers and doers are celebrated, gather, connect and build together.
